response.global_summary: A video featuring a narrative comic-style sequence followed by a live stage performance of the song 'Sympathy' by Eve, performed by virtual characters.

scenes.description: Introduction and narrative sequence featuring dialogue between virtual characters.
Live stage performance of the song 'Sympathy' by Eve, performed by virtual characters.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
想い返していた 思い出の中で泣いていた
不確かな夢と 孤独を抱えて笑ってた
この痛みも傷もいたいけな瞳も
無に帰してしまいそうな 僕らの日々を
予感していたんだ 何か大事なことを忘れて
不安と焦燥を涙に変えて 溺れてしまうくらいに
集めた言葉や 刻んだ想いが
たかが知れた共感だとしても 愛おしくって
忘れて 忘れないで
ただ歌い続けていよう あの日を越えていけるように
無に帰してしまいそうな 僕らの日々を
その手を離さないで
その手を離さないで
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I was looking back, crying inside my memories
With uncertain dreams and loneliness, I was laughing
This pain, these wounds, these innocent eyes too
Our days that seem like they'll return to nothingness
I had a premonition, I was forgetting something important
I'll turn this anxiety and unease into tears and get drowned in them
Even if the words I've gathered, or the feelings I've carved
Are just a transient sympathy, I'll still love them
I'll forget them, I won't forget them
I'll just keep on singing, wanting to make it through to the day
Those days of ours, that seem like they'll return to nothingness
Don't let go of this hand
Don't let go of this hand
